body:
Nexus has a hidden mainframe. It contains the heart of Overwatch.
The source code, secret contracts, the client list.
Governments, dictatorships, corporations — everyone buys from Nexus.
They've buried evidence of murders, covered up disasters,
manipulated elections. All through Overwatch.
In the mainframe there is a switch. A single choice:
RELEASE EVERYTHING TO THE PUBLIC — every file, every transaction,
or DELETE EVERYTHING — bury the truth forever.
The choice is yours. I didn't have time to choose.
